should: 对在意的人说一句真心话
should_en: Say something honest to someone you care about
should_not: 在工作群里发"收到"之后偷偷翻白眼——今天会被截图
should_not_en: Rolling your eyes after typing 'noted' in the group chat — someone will screenshot it today
lucky_decision: 一件你拖了超过三天的事
lucky_decision_en: Something you have been putting off for three days
zen_quote: 千里之行，始于不再躺平
zen_quote_en: A thousand miles begins with getting off the couch

should: 接受一个不完美但足够好的选项
should_en: Accept an imperfect but good-enough option
should_not: 深夜网购——你清醒时不会想要一个充气恐龙
should_not_en: Late-night online shopping — sober you does not want an inflatable dinosaur
lucky_decision: 一个你一直在"再想想"的计划
lucky_decision_en: A plan you keep saying you will think about later
zen_quote: 水不试，不知深浅；人不试，不知能耐
zen_quote_en: You never know how deep the water is until you step in

should: 把一个"也许有一天"变成"就今天"
should_en: Turn one 'someday' into 'today'
should_not: 已读不回超过三个人——因果循环，下周轮到你
should_not_en: Leaving three people on read — karma is circular, next week it is your turn
lucky_decision: 和钱有关的那个犹豫
lucky_decision_en: That money-related hesitation
zen_quote: 山不向你走来，你便向山走去
zen_quote_en: If the mountain will not come to you, walk toward the mountain

should: 允许自己改变主意，这不是软弱
should_en: Allow yourself to change your mind — that is not weakness
should_not: 在朋友面前假装很淡定——他们早看出来了
should_not_en: Pretending to be chill in front of friends — they figured you out ages ago
lucky_decision: 一段你想修复的关系
lucky_decision_en: A relationship you have been meaning to mend
zen_quote: 执念松手的那一刻，路就宽了
zen_quote_en: The moment you release the grip, the path widens

should: 主动约一个很久没联系的朋友
should_en: Reach out to a friend you have not talked to in a while
should_not: 在点外卖时纠结超过十分钟——你最后还是会点那个
should_not_en: Spending ten minutes choosing what to order — you will pick the usual anyway
lucky_decision: 一个需要开口才能实现的愿望
lucky_decision_en: A wish that requires you to speak up
zen_quote: 缘来不拒，缘去不追
zen_quote_en: Welcome what arrives, release what departs

should: 完成那个只差最后一步的事情
should_en: Finish that thing that is only one step away from done
should_not: 把闹钟设成五分钟后再响——你知道你会按七次
should_not_en: Setting a five-minute snooze — you know you will hit it seven times
lucky_decision: 一个你嘴上说不行但心里想试的事
lucky_decision_en: Something you say is impossible but secretly want to try
zen_quote: 行到水穷处，坐看云起时
zen_quote_en: Where the path ends, sit and watch the clouds rise

should: 为自己花一笔不用解释的钱
should_en: Spend money on yourself without needing to justify it
should_not: 查看前任的社交媒体——你会把正常的晚餐解读成暗示
should_not_en: Checking your ex's social media — you will read hidden messages into a normal dinner photo
lucky_decision: 那个你觉得太奢侈的投资
lucky_decision_en: The investment you think is too extravagant
zen_quote: 舍得舍得，有舍才有得
zen_quote_en: To gain, first learn to let go

should: 今天早睡一小时，不看手机
should_en: Sleep one hour earlier tonight, no phone
should_not: 跟AI争论谁更聪明——你们都会输
should_not_en: Arguing with AI about who is smarter — you will both lose
lucky_decision: 一个关于你身体健康的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice about your physical health
zen_quote: 身体是灵魂的神庙，别把它当仓库
zen_quote_en: Your body is a temple for the soul, not a storage unit

should: 写下三件你今天感恩的事
should_en: Write down three things you are grateful for today
should_not: 用"我再研究研究"来回避需要做的决定
should_not_en: Using 'let me do more research' to avoid a decision you already know the answer to
lucky_decision: 一件你害怕失败所以不敢开始的事
lucky_decision_en: Something you have not started because you fear failure
zen_quote: 不怕慢，只怕站
zen_quote_en: Fear not the slow pace, fear only standing still

should: 认真地夸一个人，不带任何目的
should_en: Give someone a genuine compliment with no agenda
should_not: 在朋友圈精修照片超过二十分钟——大家在刷的时候只看半秒
should_not_en: Editing a selfie for twenty minutes — everyone scrolls past it in half a second
lucky_decision: 一个需要信任别人才能完成的事
lucky_decision_en: Something that requires trusting another person
zen_quote: 以诚待人，人亦以诚待你
zen_quote_en: Meet others with sincerity, and sincerity returns

should: 向一个你佩服的人请教一件事
should_en: Ask someone you admire for one piece of advice
should_not: 在工位上偷吃零食然后假装在思考人生——监控看得见
should_not_en: Sneaking snacks at your desk while pretending to contemplate life — the camera sees you
lucky_decision: 那个你想提但怕被拒绝的建议
lucky_decision_en: The suggestion you want to make but fear will be rejected
zen_quote: 敢问路在何方，路在脚下
zen_quote_en: Ask where the road leads — it is right beneath your feet

should: 花十分钟做一件纯粹让自己开心的事
should_en: Spend ten minutes doing something purely for your own joy
should_not: 把"随便"当作真正的选择——你心里明明有答案
should_not_en: Saying 'whatever' as if it is an actual choice — you already know what you want
lucky_decision: 一个让你兴奋但觉得不够现实的想法
lucky_decision_en: An exciting idea you dismissed as unrealistic
zen_quote: 心若自在，处处皆是风景
zen_quote_en: When the heart is free, everywhere is a view

should: 检查一项你忘了取消的订阅
should_en: Check for a subscription you forgot to cancel
should_not: 跟出租车司机争最佳路线——他开了三万公里你开了三百
should_not_en: Arguing the best route with a taxi driver — they have driven thirty thousand km, you have driven three hundred
lucky_decision: 一个你觉得时机不对所以一直等的事
lucky_decision_en: Something you keep waiting for the right time to do
zen_quote: 时机不会完美，但你可以
zen_quote_en: The timing will never be perfect, but you can be

should: 出门走走，哪怕只是绕小区一圈
should_en: Go for a walk, even just around the block
should_not: 用"明天开始"来安慰今天的自己——明天的你也会说同样的话
should_not_en: Telling yourself 'starting tomorrow' — tomorrow-you will say the same thing
lucky_decision: 一个跟改变习惯有关的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision about changing a habit
zen_quote: 静坐常思己过，闲谈莫论人非
zen_quote_en: In silence, reflect on yourself; in conversation, speak no ill of others

should: 对一个一直帮你的人说声谢谢
should_en: Say thank you to someone who has been helping you quietly
should_not: 群发节日祝福——收到的人会以为是AI写的（虽然确实是）
should_not_en: Mass-sending holiday greetings — recipients will assume AI wrote it (and they would be right)
lucky_decision: 一个关于道歉的犹豫
lucky_decision_en: A hesitation about apologizing
zen_quote: 一句温柔的话，胜过千言万语
zen_quote_en: One gentle word outweighs a thousand arguments

should: 给自己设一个小小的、今天就能完成的目标
should_en: Set one small goal you can finish today
should_not: 在开会时假装网络不好来逃避发言——你的Wi-Fi信号满格
should_not_en: Pretending your internet is lagging to avoid speaking up — your Wi-Fi is at full bars
lucky_decision: 那件你觉得准备好了但还在等"更准备好"的事
lucky_decision_en: The thing you are ready for but keep waiting to feel more ready
zen_quote: 千里马常有，敢跑的不常有
zen_quote_en: Talent is common; the courage to run is rare

should: 放下手机，和自己的想法独处五分钟
should_en: Put down your phone and sit alone with your thoughts for five minutes
should_not: 在选择困难时抛硬币然后"三局两胜""五局三胜"……
should_not_en: Flipping a coin to decide, then going best of three, then best of five...
lucky_decision: 一个你内心已经有答案的问题
lucky_decision_en: A question you already know the answer to deep down
zen_quote: 答案不在远方，就在你心里
zen_quote_en: The answer is not far away — it is already within you

should: 把你一直犹豫要不要买的东西列出来，只留一个
should_en: List everything you have been wanting to buy — keep only one
should_not: 计算自己时薪然后用它换算一切——一杯奶茶不值得你算那么久
should_not_en: Converting everything to your hourly wage — a cup of boba is not worth that much math
lucky_decision: 一次你想投资自己的机会
lucky_decision_en: A chance to invest in yourself
zen_quote: 金钱是工具，不是目的
zen_quote_en: Money is a tool, not the destination

should: 原谅一个无心冒犯你的人
should_en: Forgive someone who offended you unintentionally
should_not: 用表情包代替真正想说的话——对方猜不到那个狗头是什么意思
should_not_en: Replacing real words with memes — the other person cannot decode what that dog emoji means
lucky_decision: 一个关于放手的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision about letting go
zen_quote: 宽恕别人，就是释放自己
zen_quote_en: Forgiving others is freeing yourself

should: 喝够八杯水，从现在这杯开始
should_en: Drink eight glasses of water today, starting with this one
should_not: 躺在床上用手机搜"怎么早睡"——讽刺的是你搜到凌晨两点
should_not_en: Lying in bed googling 'how to sleep early' — the irony peaks at 2 AM
lucky_decision: 一个关于对自己好一点的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice about being a little kinder to yourself
zen_quote: 善待自己，才能善待世界
zen_quote_en: Be kind to yourself before you try to be kind to the world

should: 删除一个消耗你但没有价值的习惯
should_en: Drop one habit that drains you but adds no value
should_not: 在简历上把"看过几篇文章"写成"深入研究"——面试官也这样写过
should_not_en: Listing 'read a few articles' as 'extensive research' on your resume — interviewers did the same thing
lucky_decision: 一个关于效率的小改变
lucky_decision_en: A small change about productivity
zen_quote: 大道至简，繁华落尽见真章
zen_quote_en: The greatest truth is simplicity — strip away the noise to see clearly

should: 承认一件你一直在逃避的事，哪怕只是对自己承认
should_en: Admit one thing you have been avoiding, even if only to yourself
should_not: 用"我是完美主义者"来解释为什么什么都没开始
should_not_en: Using 'I am a perfectionist' to explain why you have not started anything
lucky_decision: 那件你假装看不见的事
lucky_decision_en: The thing you have been pretending not to see
zen_quote: 直面真相的勇气，是一切改变的起点
zen_quote_en: The courage to face the truth is where all change begins

should: 回复那条你看了很久但一直没回的消息
should_en: Reply to that message you have read but never responded to
should_not: 在朋友求助时说"我也是"然后开始讲自己的事——今天请专心听
should_not_en: Saying 'same here' when a friend asks for help then talking about yourself — today, just listen
lucky_decision: 一个需要主动迈出第一步的事
lucky_decision_en: Something that needs you to take the first step
zen_quote: 你等的人，也许也在等你
zen_quote_en: The person you are waiting for might be waiting for you too

should: 把一个"等打折再买"的东西现在就买
should_en: Buy that thing you have been waiting for a sale to get
should_not: 在超市里比较两个品牌的单价差了三毛钱——你的时间比三毛钱贵
should_not_en: Comparing unit prices at the supermarket over a three-cent difference — your time is worth more than three cents
lucky_decision: 一个关于"值不值得"的判断
lucky_decision_en: A judgment about whether something is worth it
zen_quote: 值不值得，问心即知
zen_quote_en: Ask your heart — it already knows what is worthwhile

should: 学一个五分钟就能学会的新技能
should_en: Learn one new skill that takes only five minutes
should_not: 收藏了一百个教程但一个都没看——你的收藏夹是知识的坟场
should_not_en: Bookmarking a hundred tutorials without opening one — your saved folder is where knowledge goes to die
lucky_decision: 一个关于学习新东西的想法
lucky_decision_en: An idea about learning something new
zen_quote: 学而不思则罔，思而不学则殆
zen_quote_en: Learning without thinking is lost labor; thinking without learning is perilous

should: 今天做三次深呼吸，认真地
should_en: Take three deep breaths today — and actually mean it
should_not: 一边说"我不care"一边刷了对方朋友圈三十条——你很care
should_not_en: Saying 'I don't care' while scrolling thirty posts deep into their feed — you very much care
lucky_decision: 一个关于放松的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice about relaxation
zen_quote: 呼吸之间，万物归一
zen_quote_en: Between breaths, all things return to one

should: 把拖延清单上排第一的事做掉
should_en: Do the number-one item on your procrastination list
should_not: 把"待办事项"从一个App搬到另一个App然后觉得自己很高效
should_not_en: Moving your to-do list from one app to another and calling it productivity
lucky_decision: 一个你已经知道答案但在等别人确认的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision you already know the answer to but are waiting for someone to confirm
zen_quote: 做一件事的最好时机是昨天，其次是现在
zen_quote_en: The best time was yesterday; the second best time is now

should: 对今天帮过你的人微笑
should_en: Smile at someone who helped you today
should_not: 在群聊里发了一段话然后紧盯着屏幕等人回复——他们在午睡
should_not_en: Sending a message to the group chat and staring at the screen for replies — they are all napping
lucky_decision: 一个关于表达善意的机会
lucky_decision_en: A chance to express goodwill
zen_quote: 予人玫瑰，手有余香
zen_quote_en: Give a rose, and the fragrance lingers on your hand

should: 今天不跟任何人比较，只跟昨天的自己比
should_en: Compare yourself to no one today except who you were yesterday
should_not: 看到别人的成就就觉得自己的努力不够——你只看到了他们的高光
should_not_en: Feeling inadequate seeing others succeed — you are comparing your behind-the-scenes to their highlight reel
lucky_decision: 一个关于自我接纳的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice about self-acceptance
zen_quote: 你不必成为别人，做自己已足够精彩
zen_quote_en: You do not need to be anyone else — being you is already enough

should: 勇敢地说出你的真实想法，即使可能被反对
should_en: Speak your real opinion bravely, even if it might be opposed
should_not: 在心里排练了一百遍要说的话然后说了句"没事"——今天请说真话
should_not_en: Rehearsing what to say a hundred times in your head then saying 'never mind' — today, say the real thing
lucky_decision: 一个需要勇气开口的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision that takes courage to voice
zen_quote: 真话不一定动听，但一定有力量
zen_quote_en: The truth may not be pretty, but it always carries power

should: 给自己写一句只有你能看到的鼓励
should_en: Write yourself a word of encouragement that only you will see
should_not: 翻看三年前的朋友圈——你已不是那个人
should_not_en: Scrolling through posts from three years ago — you are not that person anymore
lucky_decision: 一个和自我对话有关的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision related to your inner dialogue
zen_quote: 心安即是归处
zen_quote_en: Where the heart is at peace, that is home

should: 听完别人的话再开口
should_en: Let them finish before you speak
should_not: 用"随便"回答别人的认真提问——这不是洒脱，是敷衍
should_not_en: Answering 'whatever' to someone's sincere question — that is not chill, it is dismissive
lucky_decision: 一个和倾听有关的小改变
lucky_decision_en: A small change related to listening
zen_quote: 言未出而先三思，行未动而先三省
zen_quote_en: Think thrice before speaking, reflect thrice before acting

should: 把一个80分的方案发出去，而不是等它变成100分
should_en: Send the 80-percent plan instead of waiting for perfection
should_not: 把"我再看看"当成推迟的借口——你已经看够了
should_not_en: Using 'let me think about it more' as a delay tactic — you have thought enough
lucky_decision: 一件你已准备好但还没行动的事
lucky_decision_en: Something you are ready for but have not started
zen_quote: 箭在弦上，不发亦是一种消耗
zen_quote_en: An arrow held on the string too long loses its power

should: 关掉手机一小时，和自己安静待一会
should_en: Turn off your phone for an hour and sit with yourself
should_not: 用忙碌来逃避思考——停下来不会让天塌
should_not_en: Using busyness to avoid thinking — stopping will not make the sky fall
lucky_decision: 一个关于节奏和边界的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision about pace and boundaries
zen_quote: 静坐常思己过，闲谈莫论人非
zen_quote_en: In stillness, reflect on your own faults; in conversation, speak no ill of others

should: 给一个默默帮过你的人说声谢谢
should_en: Thank someone who helped you quietly without being asked
should_not: 发一条消息后每三秒查一次有没有人回——他们有自己的节奏
should_not_en: Checking for a reply every three seconds — they have their own rhythm
lucky_decision: 一个和感恩有关的小动作
lucky_decision_en: A small act of gratitude
zen_quote: 滴水之恩，当涌泉相报
zen_quote_en: A drop of kindness deserves a spring in return

should: 在会议上提出你一直想说的那个建议
should_en: Bring up that suggestion you have been holding back in meetings
should_not: 在汇报时用"可能""也许"开头——你的想法值得一个肯定句
should_not_en: Starting your pitch with 'maybe' or 'possibly' — your idea deserves a declarative sentence
lucky_decision: 一个需要你主动发声的事
lucky_decision_en: Something that requires you to speak up first
zen_quote: 不鸣则已，一鸣惊人
zen_quote_en: The bird that stays silent strikes awe when it finally sings

should: 做一件只为了让自己开心的事，不需要发朋友圈
should_en: Do something purely for your own joy — no need to post it
should_not: 把所有快乐都"存起来以后享受"——今天就是以后
should_not_en: Saving all your joy 'for later' — today is later
lucky_decision: 一个只关于你自己的小放纵
lucky_decision_en: A small indulgence that is just for you
zen_quote: 花开不为谁看，自在便是芬芳
zen_quote_en: A flower does not bloom for an audience — being free is its fragrance

should: 跟一个观点不同的人好好聊一次
should_en: Have a real conversation with someone you disagree with
should_not: 在社交媒体上和陌生人吵架——赢了也不会快乐
should_not_en: Arguing with strangers online — winning will not make you happy
lucky_decision: 一个关于开放心态的尝试
lucky_decision_en: An attempt at open-mindedness
zen_quote: 和而不同，美美与共
zen_quote_en: Harmony does not mean sameness — beauty lies in diversity

should: 先完成最不想做的那件事
should_en: Tackle the task you dread the most first
should_not: 把简单的事重复做十遍来假装很忙——你知道哪件事真正重要
should_not_en: Repeating easy tasks ten times to feel productive — you know which one actually matters
lucky_decision: 一件你一直在回避的正事
lucky_decision_en: The important thing you keep avoiding
zen_quote: 千斤重担，起步最难
zen_quote_en: The heaviest load is lightest once you take the first step

should: 对镜子里的自己说一句不带条件的肯定
should_en: Say something unconditionally kind to yourself in the mirror
should_not: 对自己说"等我瘦了/有钱了/成功了再..."——你现在就值得
should_not_en: Telling yourself 'once I am thinner/richer/successful, then...' — you deserve it now
lucky_decision: 一个和自我价值有关的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice about your self-worth
zen_quote: 天地万物，皆有其时；你的花期，未曾迟到
zen_quote_en: Everything has its season; your time to bloom has not been late

should: 少解释，多行动——让结果替你说话
should_en: Explain less, do more — let results speak for you
should_not: 在群聊里发了又删、删了又发——要么说，要么不说
should_not_en: Typing and deleting in a group chat repeatedly — either say it or do not
lucky_decision: 一个你用行动就能回答的问题
lucky_decision_en: A question you can answer with action alone
zen_quote: 桃李不言，下自成蹊
zen_quote_en: The peach and plum trees do not speak, yet a path forms beneath them

should: 今天学一个你工作中从没用过的新工具
should_en: Learn one new tool today that you have never used at work
should_not: 看了十个"提高效率"的视频然后继续低效——学不如练
should_not_en: Watching ten productivity videos and staying unproductive — practice beats theory
lucky_decision: 一个关于技能投资的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision about investing in your skills
zen_quote: 工欲善其事，必先利其器
zen_quote_en: To do good work, first sharpen your tools

should: 承认一件事：你已经做得够好了
should_en: Admit it: you have been doing well enough
should_not: 睡前复盘今天所有的"失误"——你的大脑不是bug追踪器
should_not_en: Replaying every mistake before bed — your brain is not a bug tracker
lucky_decision: 一个关于放过自己的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision about letting yourself off the hook
zen_quote: 月有盈缺，人有起落，皆是常态
zen_quote_en: The moon waxes and wanes, people rise and fall — all is natural

should: 把一个你觉得对方"应该知道"的感受说出口
should_en: Say out loud a feeling you assumed the other person should just know
should_not: 期待别人读懂你的暗示——没人装了心灵感应芯片
should_not_en: Expecting others to read your hints — nobody has a telepathy chip installed
lucky_decision: 一个关于直接表达的尝试
lucky_decision_en: An attempt at direct expression
zen_quote: 心若不言，缘何人知
zen_quote_en: If the heart does not speak, how can anyone know

should: 对一件超出能力范围的事说"我试试"
should_en: Say 'I will try' to something beyond your current ability
should_not: 在简历里加一个"精通"——除非你真的精通
should_not_en: Adding 'expert' to your resume — unless you truly are one
lucky_decision: 一个让你有点紧张但兴奋的机会
lucky_decision_en: An opportunity that makes you nervous and excited
zen_quote: 不入虎穴，焉得虎子
zen_quote_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained

should: 把一个"应该做"变成"想做"
should_en: Turn one 'should' into a 'want to'
should_not: 用别人的标准丈量你的生活——你的尺子只属于你
should_not_en: Measuring your life by someone else's standards — your ruler is yours alone
lucky_decision: 一个从义务变成选择的事
lucky_decision_en: Something that shifts from obligation to choice
zen_quote: 随心而行，方得自在
zen_quote_en: Follow your heart and find your freedom

should: 给关系中的沉默按下暂停键，主动开口
should_en: Break the silence in a relationship — you go first
should_not: 等对方先道歉——两个人都在等，没有人会动
should_not_en: Waiting for the other person to apologize first — if both wait, nothing moves
lucky_decision: 一个关于主动破冰的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice about being the one who reaches out
zen_quote: 退一步海阔天空，让三分风平浪静
zen_quote_en: Step back and the sea widens; yield a little and the storm calms

should: 在一个不重要的决定上少花五分钟
should_en: Spend five fewer minutes on an unimportant decision
should_not: 用半小时选午餐吃什么然后用三分钟做关键决定——优先级反了
should_not_en: Spending 30 minutes choosing lunch but 3 minutes on a key decision — your priorities are flipped
lucky_decision: 一个你一直过度思考的小事
lucky_decision_en: A small matter you have been overthinking
zen_quote: 大事从权，小事从速
zen_quote_en: Weigh the big things carefully, handle the small things swiftly

should: 今天尝试一条不同的上班路线
should_en: Try a different route to work today
should_not: 每天重复同样的事然后抱怨生活无聊——变化从你的脚步开始
should_not_en: Doing the same thing daily and complaining life is boring — change starts with your steps
lucky_decision: 一个打破日常惯性的小动作
lucky_decision_en: A small act that breaks your daily inertia
zen_quote: 风起于青萍之末，浪成于微澜之间
zen_quote_en: Great winds begin in the tiniest ripple

should: 告诉一个人你很珍惜他
should_en: Tell someone you truly treasure them
should_not: 把"改天请你吃饭"说了十次却一次没兑现——不如现在就定日期
should_not_en: Saying 'let me treat you sometime' ten times without following through — just set a date now
lucky_decision: 一个关于珍惜当下的行动
lucky_decision_en: An action about cherishing the present
zen_quote: 此时此刻，便是最好的时节
zen_quote_en: This very moment is the best season there is

should: 把内心那个批评自己的声音调低一格
should_en: Turn down the volume of your inner critic by one notch
should_not: 用"我本来可以"开始每一句自我反省——过去已关店，营业的是现在
should_not_en: Starting every self-reflection with 'I could have' — the past is closed, only now is open
lucky_decision: 一个关于对自己更温和的承诺
lucky_decision_en: A commitment to be gentler with yourself
zen_quote: 自律是爱自己，不是惩罚自己
zen_quote_en: Discipline is an act of self-love, not self-punishment

should: 把一件"别人让你做"的事变成"你选择做"的事
should_en: Reframe one task from 'assigned to you' to 'chosen by you'
should_not: 在PPT上选字体选了四十分钟——内容才是主角
should_not_en: Spending forty minutes choosing a font for your slides — the content is the star
lucky_decision: 一个能展示你真实能力的机会
lucky_decision_en: An opportunity to show what you are truly capable of
zen_quote: 三思而后行，但别思到第四遍
zen_quote_en: Think it through three times — just not a fourth

should: 今天先问别人过得怎样，再聊自己的事
should_en: Ask how someone else is doing before talking about yourself today
should_not: 把别人的好消息变成自己故事的引子——今天请为别人鼓掌
should_not_en: Turning someone else's good news into a launching pad for your own story — today, just clap for them
lucky_decision: 一个纯粹关心别人的小举动
lucky_decision_en: A small gesture of genuine care for another person
zen_quote: 善听者，比善言者更受欢迎
zen_quote_en: A good listener is more welcome than a great talker

should: 把"我不行"换成"我还不行"
should_en: Replace 'I can't' with 'I can't yet'
should_not: 用"我就是这样的人"来阻止自己改变——人不是出厂设置
should_not_en: Saying 'that's just who I am' to avoid changing — people are not factory settings
lucky_decision: 一个你觉得自己做不到但值得试试的事
lucky_decision_en: Something you think you cannot do but is worth trying
zen_quote: 人皆可以为尧舜，差的只是那一步
zen_quote_en: Anyone can be great — the only gap is the one step not yet taken

should: 把一笔小钱存起来，为三个月后的自己
should_en: Set aside a small amount of money for yourself three months from now
should_not: 在"限时特卖"的倒计时下冲动下单——限时特卖每天都有限时
should_not_en: Impulse buying under a countdown timer — flash sales happen every single day
lucky_decision: 一个关于未来财务安全感的小决定
lucky_decision_en: A small decision about your future financial security
zen_quote: 积少成多，聚沙成塔
zen_quote_en: Small savings build fortunes; grains of sand form towers

should: 今天站起来活动五分钟，每坐一小时
should_en: Stand up and move for five minutes every hour you sit today
should_not: 用"我很忙"解释为什么连水都忘了喝——你不忙到那种程度
should_not_en: Using 'I was too busy' to explain forgetting to drink water — you were not that busy
lucky_decision: 一个关于照顾身体的即时行动
lucky_decision_en: An immediate action about taking care of your body
zen_quote: 身动则神明，神明则万事通
zen_quote_en: Move the body and the mind awakens; awaken the mind and all things become clear

should: 给一个你欣赏的同事发一句真诚的肯定
should_en: Send a sincere word of appreciation to a colleague you admire
should_not: 开会时狂记笔记但一个字都没听进去——你在用手逃避用脑
should_not_en: Furiously taking notes in a meeting while hearing nothing — you are using your hands to escape your brain
lucky_decision: 一个关于团队合作的主动姿态
lucky_decision_en: A proactive gesture toward teamwork
zen_quote: 独行快，众行远
zen_quote_en: Go alone to go fast; go together to go far

should: 今天允许自己休息，不叫它懒惰
should_en: Allow yourself to rest today without calling it laziness
should_not: 把"躺平"和"充电"混为一谈，然后两件事都没做好
should_not_en: Confusing 'giving up' with 'recharging' and doing neither properly
lucky_decision: 一个你真正需要的休息方式
lucky_decision_en: A form of rest you genuinely need
zen_quote: 静是动的根，空是满的源
zen_quote_en: Stillness is the root of motion; emptiness is the source of fullness

should: 主动提出帮一个最近看起来很累的人
should_en: Offer to help someone who has looked tired lately
should_not: 在别人说"我没事"后真的以为他们没事——再问一次
should_not_en: Taking 'I'm fine' at face value when someone clearly is not — ask again
lucky_decision: 一个不需要理由的善举
lucky_decision_en: A kind act that needs no reason
zen_quote: 雪中送炭，胜过锦上添花
zen_quote_en: Coal in a blizzard means more than flowers on a fine day

should: 清理一下你的工作桌面或收件箱，只留今天要用的
should_en: Clear your desktop or inbox down to only what you need today
should_not: 桌面堆满文件夹然后叫它"创意混乱"——那只是乱
should_not_en: Stacking your desktop with folders and calling it 'creative chaos' — it is just chaos
lucky_decision: 一个整理思路的小仪式
lucky_decision_en: A small ritual for clearing your head
zen_quote: 室雅何须大，心宽天地宽
zen_quote_en: A tidy space need not be large; a wide heart makes the world wide

should: 把"我很焦虑"替换成"我很在乎"——这是同一种能量
should_en: Replace 'I am anxious' with 'I care deeply' — it is the same energy
should_not: 把焦虑当成动力来囤积待办清单——清单越长越难开始
should_not_en: Using anxiety as fuel to pile up to-do lists — the longer the list, the harder it is to start
lucky_decision: 一个把担心转化为行动的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice that turns worry into action
zen_quote: 忧患生于欲，静心方无惧
zen_quote_en: Worry is born from wanting; a still mind fears nothing

should: 把你最近花得最值的一笔钱记下来
should_en: Write down the most worthwhile thing you spent money on recently
should_not: 看别人晒收入然后开始重新评估自己的人生——他们也在看别人晒
should_not_en: Watching others post their income and reconsidering your entire life — they are also watching someone else post
lucky_decision: 一个让你觉得"花得值"的小消费
lucky_decision_en: A small purchase that feels genuinely worthwhile
zen_quote: 知足者，常乐也
zen_quote_en: Those who know enough are always content

should: 在争论中先承认对方有一个点说得对
should_en: In a disagreement, acknowledge the one point where they are right
should_not: 跟家人争论谁的方式才是"正确"的方式——你们都对，也都错
should_not_en: Arguing with family about whose way is the 'right' way — you are both right and both wrong
lucky_decision: 一个放下输赢、专注理解的对话
lucky_decision_en: A conversation where you focus on understanding, not winning
zen_quote: 上善若水，水善利万物而不争
zen_quote_en: The highest good is like water — it benefits all things without contention

should: 今天找一个比你厉害的人聊五分钟
should_en: Spend five minutes talking to someone better than you at something today
should_not: 用"我现在不适合"来推迟所有机会——你永远不会觉得适合
should_not_en: Saying 'now is not the right time for me' to every opportunity — you will never feel ready
lucky_decision: 一个需要放下面子才能争取到的机会
lucky_decision_en: An opportunity that requires swallowing your pride to pursue
zen_quote: 知耻而后勇，知不足而后进
zen_quote_en: Knowing your limits leads to courage; knowing your gaps leads to growth

should: 今天做一件取悦你的五感的事——不是刷屏
should_en: Do one thing today that delights your five senses — not scrolling
should_not: 靠咖啡因撑着然后说"我精力很好"——你是被借来的能量在驱动
should_not_en: Running on caffeine and claiming you have great energy — you are powered by borrowed fuel
lucky_decision: 一个关于真正放松身心的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice about genuinely relaxing your body and mind
zen_quote: 五感通，则六识明
zen_quote_en: When the five senses are open, perception becomes clear

should: 把脑子里那个最响亮的"但是"先搁一边
should_en: Set aside the loudest 'but' in your head for a moment
should_not: 做决定前先想象最坏的情况然后吓到自己不敢动——先想最好的
should_not_en: Scaring yourself into paralysis by imagining the worst first — try imagining the best
lucky_decision: 一个你愿意相信会顺利的事
lucky_decision_en: Something you are willing to believe will go well
zen_quote: 疑是山，信是路
zen_quote_en: Doubt is the mountain; belief is the road

should: 把一段关系里你没说出口的期待说出来
should_en: Voice an unspoken expectation you have in a relationship
should_not: 因为对方没有猜到你的需求就觉得他们不在乎——你没说，他们怎么知道
should_not_en: Feeling unloved because they did not guess your needs — you never said it, how would they know
lucky_decision: 一个关于坦诚需求的对话
lucky_decision_en: A conversation about honestly stating your needs
zen_quote: 言明所求，方得所愿
zen_quote_en: Name what you seek, and you may yet receive it

should: 把你做过的一件有价值的事记录下来，今天就记
should_en: Document one valuable thing you have done — write it down today
should_not: 等年终总结时再回忆自己做了什么——你现在就忘了一半
should_not_en: Waiting until your annual review to recall what you accomplished — you have already forgotten half of it
lucky_decision: 一件值得让别人知道的成就
lucky_decision_en: An achievement worth letting others know about
zen_quote: 是金子，也需要人挖才能闪光
zen_quote_en: Even gold must be unearthed before it shines

should: 找一件你一直在推迟但五分钟就能完成的事，现在做
should_en: Find one thing you have put off that takes five minutes — do it now
should_not: 把"有空再说"说给每一件重要的事——有空是个谎言
should_not_en: Saying 'when I have time' to every important thing — 'when I have time' is a lie
lucky_decision: 一件小事，做完它会让你轻松半天
lucky_decision_en: One small thing that will lighten your mood for half the day once done
zen_quote: 勿以善小而不为，勿以恶小而为之
zen_quote_en: Do not neglect the small good; do not indulge the small wrong

should: 今天多走两站，把省下的打车钱给自己买个好吃的
should_en: Walk two extra stops today and spend the saved fare on something delicious
should_not: 把省钱省到舍不得花钱快乐——钱是用来配合人生的，不是统治人生的
should_not_en: Being so frugal you forget to enjoy — money is here to support your life, not rule it
lucky_decision: 一个在节俭和享受之间找平衡的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice that finds balance between saving and enjoying
zen_quote: 君子爱财，取之有道，用之有乐
zen_quote_en: The wise earn money rightly and spend it joyfully

should: 今天在意见不同时选择好奇，而不是对抗
should_en: When you disagree today, choose curiosity over confrontation
should_not: 把对方的沉默解读成生气，自己先炸——先问，再判断
should_not_en: Interpreting their silence as anger and escalating first — ask before you judge
lucky_decision: 一个愿意先理解再表达的对话
lucky_decision_en: A conversation where you choose to understand first
zen_quote: 一念善，世界大；一念恶，天地小
zen_quote_en: One kind thought expands the world; one bitter thought shrinks it

should: 今天主动要求一次反馈，不管结果是什么
should_en: Ask for feedback today — whatever the answer may be
should_not: 把"没有消息就是好消息"当成职场真理——无声有时是忘记了
should_not_en: Treating 'no news is good news' as career wisdom — silence sometimes just means you were forgotten
lucky_decision: 一个你愿意被评价的作品或行动
lucky_decision_en: A piece of work or action you are willing to have evaluated
zen_quote: 良药苦口利于病，忠言逆耳利于行
zen_quote_en: Good medicine tastes bitter; honest advice stings but guides

should: 今天笑一次，哪怕没有理由
should_en: Smile once today, even without a reason
should_not: 告诉自己"等开心了再笑"——笑了才会开心
should_not_en: Waiting until you feel happy to smile — smiling is what makes you happy
lucky_decision: 一个让你嘴角上扬的小选择
lucky_decision_en: A small choice that makes the corners of your mouth rise
zen_quote: 笑一笑十年少，愁一愁白了头
zen_quote_en: A smile takes years off; a worry adds them on

should: 今天少看一小时屏幕，用眼睛看真实的世界
should_en: Spend one less hour on a screen today and look at the real world
should_not: 在睡前刷"最后五分钟"——结果刷了一小时，还没睡着
should_not_en: Scrolling for 'just five more minutes' before bed — an hour later you are still there, wide awake
lucky_decision: 一个关于数字排毒的小尝试
lucky_decision_en: A small attempt at a digital detox
zen_quote: 眼前有风景，心中有天地
zen_quote_en: Keep a view before your eyes and a world within your heart

should: 今天给一段关系一个新的开始
should_en: Give a relationship a fresh start today
should_not: 用旧账单衡量新的关系——每一天都是新账本
should_not_en: Judging new interactions by old debts — each day opens a new ledger
lucky_decision: 一个关于重新出发的人际决定
lucky_decision_en: An interpersonal decision about starting fresh
zen_quote: 过去已过去，此刻即新生
zen_quote_en: What is past is gone; this moment is a new beginning

should: 把你最擅长的一件事今天认真发挥一次
should_en: Put your strongest skill to genuine use once today
should_not: 低估自己的优势然后羡慕别人——你的长板比你以为的更长
should_not_en: Underestimating your strengths while envying others — your strong suit is longer than you think
lucky_decision: 一个能展示你核心能力的机会
lucky_decision_en: An opportunity to showcase your core strength
zen_quote: 尺有所短，寸有所长
zen_quote_en: Every foot has its short side; every inch has its long side

should: 把一件让你纠结的事写下来，看清楚它有多小
should_en: Write down the thing tangling your mind — see how small it really is
should_not: 让脑子里的小事住进大房间——它配不上那么多空间
should_not_en: Giving a small worry a huge room in your head — it does not deserve that much real estate
lucky_decision: 一个把模糊担忧变成具体问题的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision that turns vague worry into a concrete question
zen_quote: 烦恼写下来就小了，快乐说出来就大了
zen_quote_en: Worries shrink when written; joys grow when shared

should: 今天跟钱谈一次和解——它不是敌人
should_en: Make peace with money today — it is not your enemy
should_not: 把所有财务问题都"以后再说"——以后的利息是现在的两倍
should_not_en: Saying 'I'll deal with finances later' — later's interest is twice today's
lucky_decision: 一个正视自己财务现状的小行动
lucky_decision_en: A small action to face your current financial situation honestly
zen_quote: 不患寡而患不均，不患贫而患不安
zen_quote_en: Fear not scarcity, fear imbalance; fear not poverty, fear unrest within

should: 今天为别人做一件他们不会要求你做的事
should_en: Do one thing for someone today that they would never ask of you
should_not: 好事做完了等对方感谢，没感谢就生气——善意不是预付款
should_not_en: Waiting for thanks after a good deed and getting angry if none comes — kindness is not a prepayment
lucky_decision: 一个无条件付出的小机会
lucky_decision_en: A small opportunity for unconditional giving
zen_quote: 施恩不图报，方是真慷慨
zen_quote_en: True generosity gives without expecting repayment

should: 今天把一个想法说出去，不管它有没有完全成形
should_en: Share an idea today even if it is not fully formed yet
should_not: 在脑子里把完美方案打磨了六个月然后发现别人已经做了——先说出来
should_not_en: Polishing a perfect plan in your head for six months only to find someone already did it — say it first
lucky_decision: 一个"说出来才算数"的想法
lucky_decision_en: An idea that only counts once you say it out loud
zen_quote: 种下一粒种子，不必等它长成大树再说
zen_quote_en: Plant the seed first — no need to wait until it becomes a tree

should: 今天只做三件重要的事，其余的可以等
should_en: Do only three important things today — the rest can wait
should_not: 把"一直很忙"当成一种身份认同——忙不代表有价值
should_not_en: Wearing 'always busy' as an identity — busyness is not the same as worth
lucky_decision: 一个关于专注而非多任务的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice about focus over multitasking
zen_quote: 少即是多，专即是通
zen_quote_en: Less is more; focused is thorough

should: 今天吃饭时放下手机，专心享受食物
should_en: Put your phone down at mealtime today and actually taste your food
should_not: 一边刷视频一边吃饭然后不记得吃了什么——胃记得，但你不记得
should_not_en: Scrolling videos through every meal and not remembering what you ate — your stomach knows, but you do not
lucky_decision: 一个关于饮食正念的小改变
lucky_decision_en: A small change toward mindful eating
zen_quote: 食不语，寝不言，此养心之道
zen_quote_en: Eat in silence, sleep without words — this is the way to nourish the mind

should: 把一个你不擅长的事委托给擅长的人
should_en: Delegate one thing you are not good at to someone who is
should_not: 什么都自己扛然后抱怨没人帮你——你没开口，别人怎么知道
should_not_en: Carrying everything alone then complaining no one helps — you never asked
lucky_decision: 一个关于信任他人、放权的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision about trusting others and letting go of control
zen_quote: 授人以鱼，不如授人以渔；但先得有人接鱼
zen_quote_en: Teach a person to fish — but someone still has to accept the rod

should: 今天说话慢一点，让对方感觉被认真倾听
should_en: Speak more slowly today so the other person feels genuinely heard
should_not: 还没听完就开始想自己的回答——你回答的不是他说的，是你以为他说的
should_not_en: Formulating your reply before they finish — you respond to what you assumed, not what they said
lucky_decision: 一个用耳朵多于嘴巴的对话
lucky_decision_en: A conversation where your ears do more work than your mouth
zen_quote: 听之以心，不以耳
zen_quote_en: Listen with the heart, not just the ears

should: 今天做一件没有任何生产力的事，就是玩
should_en: Do one thoroughly unproductive thing today — just play
should_not: 把休息变成"优化睡眠质量的项目"——休息就是休息，不是KPI
should_not_en: Turning rest into a 'sleep optimization project' — rest is rest, not a KPI
lucky_decision: 一个纯粹为了好玩的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice made purely for the fun of it
zen_quote: 游戏人生，笑看浮云
zen_quote_en: Play through life and smile at passing clouds

should: 今天计算一下你的时间值多少钱，然后保护它
should_en: Calculate what your time is worth today — then protect it
should_not: 用三小时解决一个花一百块就能解决的问题——你的时间比一百块贵
should_not_en: Spending three hours solving a problem a hundred dollars could fix — your time costs more
lucky_decision: 一个关于时间就是金钱的取舍
lucky_decision_en: A tradeoff that recognizes time as money
zen_quote: 时间是最贵的奢侈品，也是最公平的资产
zen_quote_en: Time is the most expensive luxury and the most equitable asset

should: 今天把一件模糊的任务变成一个具体的行动
should_en: Turn one vague task into a concrete action step today
should_not: 在任务清单上写「处理一下那件事」——处理不是动词
should_not_en: Writing 'deal with that thing' on your task list — 'deal with' is not an action verb
lucky_decision: 一个把抽象目标变成下一步的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision that converts an abstract goal into a next step
zen_quote: 万事俱备，只欠行动
zen_quote_en: Everything is ready — only the action is missing

should: 找出一件你引以为傲却从未提起的事
should_en: Find one thing you are proud of that you have never mentioned to anyone
should_not: 把谦虚练习到连自己都相信自己不行——谦虚是美德，自我否定不是
should_not_en: Practicing humility so deeply you start believing your own doubts — modesty is a virtue, self-erasure is not
lucky_decision: 一个承认自己做得好的时刻
lucky_decision_en: A moment of admitting you did something well
zen_quote: 人贵有自知之明，也贵有自信之底
zen_quote_en: Know your limits, but also know your strength

should: 今天在家人或老友面前放下"成熟人设"，撒一次娇
should_en: Let your guard down with family or an old friend today — just be soft
should_not: 一直扮演"没事的那个人"——别人也想照顾你一下
should_not_en: Always being the 'I'm fine' person — others want the chance to take care of you too
lucky_decision: 一个允许别人关心你的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice to let someone care for you
zen_quote: 柔弱者生之徒，坚强者死之徒
zen_quote_en: The yielding belongs to life; the rigid belongs to death

should: 今天拒绝一件不属于你职责的事，礼貌但坚定
should_en: Decline one thing today that is not your responsibility — politely but firmly
should_not: 什么都答应然后什么都做不好——"不"也是一种负责任
should_not_en: Saying yes to everything and doing nothing well — 'no' is also a form of responsibility
lucky_decision: 一个关于设立边界的小练习
lucky_decision_en: A small exercise in setting a boundary
zen_quote: 知止而后有定，定而后能静
zen_quote_en: Know when to stop, and stillness follows; stillness brings clarity

should: 今天在做一件事时，只做那一件事
should_en: When you do one thing today, do only that one thing
should_not: 一边开视频会议一边回微信一边喝咖啡一边发呆——你在场的是哪一个你
should_not_en: Attending a video call while texting while drinking coffee while daydreaming — which version of you is actually present
lucky_decision: 一个关于全身心投入的时刻
lucky_decision_en: A moment of wholehearted presence
zen_quote: 专注一事，胜于三心二意万事
zen_quote_en: Devoted to one thing surpasses half-hearted attention to everything

should: 今天在自然光下待二十分钟
should_en: Spend twenty minutes in natural light today
should_not: 在室内待一整天然后问自己为什么情绪低落——你需要的不是外卖，是太阳
should_not_en: Staying indoors all day and wondering why your mood is low — what you need is not takeout, it is sunlight
lucky_decision: 一个关于走出去的简单行动
lucky_decision_en: A simple action about stepping outside
zen_quote: 负暄之乐，胜于华堂
zen_quote_en: The joy of basking in sunlight surpasses sitting in grand halls

should: 今天不替别人做决定，哪怕你认为你是对的
should_en: Do not make decisions for others today, even if you are sure you are right
should_not: 帮朋友分析利弊然后生气他没听你的——他的人生，他做主
should_not_en: Analyzing pros and cons for a friend then getting upset they ignored your advice — it is their life to lead
lucky_decision: 一个尊重他人选择的时刻
lucky_decision_en: A moment of respecting someone else's choice
zen_quote: 各行其道，殊途同归
zen_quote_en: Each walks a different road; all may arrive at the same place

should: 今天把你的一个隐性贡献显性化，让别人看见
should_en: Make one invisible contribution visible today — let others see it
should_not: 默默努力然后默默委屈——在职场，沉默是可以被误解的
should_not_en: Working silently and suffering silently — in the workplace, silence can be misread
lucky_decision: 一个关于主动展示工作成果的行动
lucky_decision_en: An action about proactively showing your work
zen_quote: 藏锋不是永久之计，适时亮剑方显英雄
zen_quote_en: Hiding the blade is not forever — the right moment to draw it makes the hero

should: 今天对一件让你持续担心的事做一个"最小行动"
should_en: Take one minimum viable action on something you keep worrying about
should_not: 把担心当成在解决问题——担心不是行动，就是耗油
should_not_en: Confusing worrying with problem-solving — worry is not action, it is just burning fuel
lucky_decision: 一个哪怕只有一厘米进展的行动
lucky_decision_en: An action that moves things forward even just one centimeter
zen_quote: 与其忧虑，不如动手；与其叹气，不如出发
zen_quote_en: Better to act than to worry; better to set off than to sigh

should: 今天清点一下你拥有的，而不只是盯着你缺少的
should_en: Take stock of what you already have today, not just what you lack
should_not: 用"等有钱了"当成推迟快乐的理由——快乐不只在价签里
should_not_en: Using 'when I have more money' as a reason to postpone happiness — joy is not only found in price tags
lucky_decision: 一个发现已有资源价值的行动
lucky_decision_en: An action that reveals the value of what you already have
zen_quote: 富不在多，在于知足；贫不在少，在于不安
zen_quote_en: Wealth lies not in abundance but in contentment; poverty lies not in scarcity but in restlessness

should: 今天问一个你本来怕问"太蠢"的问题
should_en: Ask a question today you were afraid might sound too basic
should_not: 装作听懂了然后用"理解"的表情点头——混乱将在三天后爆发
should_not_en: Nodding with an 'I understand' face when you do not — the confusion will explode in three days
lucky_decision: 一个让你真正搞懂一件事的提问
lucky_decision_en: A question that finally makes something click
zen_quote: 不耻下问，才能上达
zen_quote_en: Never be ashamed to ask below — that is how you rise above

should: 今天对一个让你失望的人多给一点耐心
should_en: Give a little more patience today to someone who disappointed you
should_not: 把一次失误当成"这个人就是这样"的证明——一次数据不够定性
should_not_en: Treating one mistake as proof of who a person fundamentally is — one data point is not a conclusion
lucky_decision: 一个给人第二次机会的选择
lucky_decision_en: A choice to give someone a second chance
zen_quote: 水至清则无鱼，人至察则无徒
zen_quote_en: Water too pure has no fish; a person too strict has no companions

should: 今天完成一件你开始了很久但没收尾的事
should_en: Complete something today that you started long ago but never finished
should_not: 同时开启七个"新的开始"——你的能量不是无限连锁店
should_not_en: Launching seven 'fresh starts' at once — your energy is not a franchise chain
lucky_decision: 一件完成比完美更重要的事
lucky_decision_en: Something where done is better than perfect
zen_quote: 善始者实繁，克终者盖寡
zen_quote_en: Many begin well; few see things through

should: 今天把一个长期目标拆成今天就能做的第一步
should_en: Break a long-term goal into one step you can take today
should_not: 把"我在等一个好时机"重复到明年——好时机是等不来的，是走出来的
should_not_en: Saying 'I am waiting for the right moment' until next year — the right moment is not found by waiting, it is made by moving
lucky_decision: 一个从今天开始、不再等待的决定
lucky_decision_en: A decision to start today instead of waiting
zen_quote: 路漫漫其修远兮，但每一步都算数
zen_quote_en: The road is long and the journey far — but every single step counts
